title: Kaisi Yeh Yaariaan
desc: Manik tries to apologize to Nandini. Nandini tells Dhruv and others about Harshad's plan. Navya confronts Harshad about their relationship. Manik tries to contact Kabir. Navya calls Nandini. S01 E90.
